subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great meeting you at the conference.

We’d be glad to continue the conversation. Please share a few options for a 30-minute call over the next two weeks (including your timezone), and we’ll pick one that works on our side.

On the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: per our security and privacy policy, we don’t share internal direct phone numbers or personal contact information externally. Once we’ve clarified the collaboration scope, we’ll ensure the right senior technical stakeholders are involved in any subsequent meetings.

Best regards,
Agent
